raw_consumer_statement: I was charged for a vacation package from XXXX which is a scam company. They did not provide the service purchased as I have mentioned multiple times and explained and provided documentation on. American Express has helped this company do what I consider stealing, because of XXXX saying that they provide the service with literally no proof. In their most recent response, Amex said I did not provide proof that XXXX XXXX were part of the purchase- though I have- and so I am willing to provide them again. Not only is there an explicit email that says I will get greeted by XXXX butlers at arrival which did not happen, but also I have provided the description of complete XXXX XXXX from their website. XXXX  does not offer XXXX XXXXe as an add on, it is with certain room types which I already explained to the American Express representative as well. I believe I was scammed and then American Express told me too bad multiple times. {$16000.00} isnt a small amount of money. I deserve my money back for what I didnt receive and a {$500.00} rewards points credit from what I think is a shady scam company, XXXX, is nothing. I want to say I cant believe that neither XXXX  nor American Express cares about the theft, disregard for safety and individuals with XXXX, etc. but I can actually believe it, what horrendous companies.
